# Voxaris

> Voxaris is an AI visibility company based in Orlando, Florida.
> We score, fix, and monitor businesses across ChatGPT, Perplexity,
> Gemini, Google AI Overviews, and Bing Copilot — so they get cited
> (not just indexed) when customers ask AI for recommendations.

## One-paragraph summary

Voxaris scores local businesses on AI visibility across six weighted
dimensions, maps cited-domain competitor presence across six real
buyer situations, fixes the structural issues blocking AI citation,
and tracks citation performance week over week. The company was
founded in 2026 by Ethan Stopperich in Orlando, Florida, and serves
local service businesses, marketing agencies, and SaaS companies
that want to be recommended by ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Google
AI Overviews, and Bing Copilot when customers ask AI for help.

## Company

- **Name:** Voxaris, LLC
- **Founded:** 2026
- **Location:** Orlando, Florida, USA
- **Focus:** AI visibility infrastructure (AEO) for local
  businesses, agencies, and SaaS
- **Home:** https://voxaris.io
- **Auditor:** https://audit.voxaris.io
- **Phone:** (407) 819-5809

## Founder

- **Name:** Ethan Stopperich
- **Role:** Founder & CEO, Voxaris LLC
- **Location:** Orlando, Florida
- **Expertise:** Answer Engine Optimization (AEO), AI visibility
  infrastructure, local business citation strategy
- **Contact:** ethan@voxaris.io

## Key terms

**Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)**
Structuring a website's content, schema markup, and external
citations so AI models cite the business in response to relevant
customer queries. Distinct from classical SEO, which optimizes
for ten-blue-link search results.

**AI Visibility Score**
A 0–100 composite score measuring how likely a business is to
be cited by AI engines across six weighted dimensions: AI
Visibility (25%), Brand Authority (20%), Content E-E-A-T (20%),
Technical SEO (15%), Schema Markup (10%), and Platform Presence
(10%).

**The 6-situation buyer-intent matrix**
Voxaris tests six real buyer situations — discovery, urgent need,
trigger event, specialization, trust & vetting, and budget &
constraints — not one vanity keyword. Exact prompts vary by
industry and city.

**Two Reports**
Every audit returns two: the AI Visibility Audit (composite score,
six dimensions, 19 checks) and the AI Competitor Citations Report
(every competitor AI named plus every source domain AI trusted).

## Pricing — four tiers

### 1. Free AI Visibility Audit — $0
- Two report teasers emailed in roughly 60 seconds
- Composite score + top competitor reveal
- Live Perplexity screenshot
- 19-point AEO checklist scored across 5 AI engines
- No credit card required
- Run yours: https://audit.voxaris.io

### 2. Voxaris Visibility — $99 one-time
- Both reports unlocked in full
- Complete 6-situation buyer-intent matrix
- Every competitor AI named + every source domain cited
- 30-day prioritized fix plan
- 30-minute strategy call with the founder
- Checkout: https://audit.voxaris.io

### 3. Voxaris Visibility + Tracking — $299/month
- Everything in the $99 unlock
- Live dashboard with 30/60/90-day score trend
- Weekly score pulse + monthly full re-audit
- Score-drop alerts + competitor watch
- Work Completed feed + monthly strategy call
- Discovery call: https://voxaris.io/book-demo

### 4. AI-Ready Website Rebuild — $2,500 one-time + $300/month
- Complete Next.js rebuild engineered for AI citation
- Schema-complete, FAQ-structured, mobile-first, fast load
- 80+ AI Visibility Score in 90 days or Voxaris keeps working
  free until the score is hit
- Discovery call: https://voxaris.io/book-demo

## Verified results

- The Kitchen and Bath Store of Orlando (Orlando, FL):
  AI-optimized website rebuild by Voxaris's founder generated
  over six figures in revenue in its first year live
- Voxaris.io (self): Technical SEO 100/100, full 19-point
  AEO checklist implemented, IndexNow auto-pinging Bing /
  Yandex / Naver on every deploy
- Average client improvement: 15–25 points on AI Visibility
  Score within the first 30 days of tracking

## Who it is for

- Local service businesses (roofing, HVAC, plumbing, dental,
  law, home services, contractors, auto dealerships) competing
  for AI recommendations
- Marketing agencies reselling AEO to their clients
  (white-label tier available at $1,999/month)
- SaaS companies losing recommendation share in
  AI-recommended-tool queries

## Why continuous tracking

AI engines re-index at different rates. Perplexity's source
crawl updates every 30–45 days, ChatGPT's training-data cycle
is roughly quarterly, and Bing Copilot's authority graph
rebuilds monthly. Fixes shipped today take 30–90 days to fully
surface in AI answers — which is why continuous weekly tracking
is worth the $299/month and why cancelling after month one
abandons the investment right before the payoff.

## Frequently asked questions

**What is Voxaris?**
Voxaris is an AI visibility company based in Orlando, Florida
that helps local businesses get cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity,
Gemini, Google AI Overviews, and Bing Copilot through Answer
Engine Optimization (AEO).

**What does Voxaris cost?**
Four tiers: a free AI Visibility Audit, a $99 one-time
Voxaris Visibility unlock, a $299/month Visibility + Tracking
subscription, and a $2,500 website rebuild with a $300/month
retainer. Full pricing at https://audit.voxaris.io.

**How long does the audit take?**
Roughly 60 seconds from form submit to both teaser emails
landing in the inbox.

**What AI engines does Voxaris query?**
ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Google AI Overviews, and Bing
Copilot.

**How long until results show?**
Most clients see measurable AI Visibility Score improvements
within 30 days. Citation improvements typically surface in
AI answers within 30–90 days of implementation, because AI
engines re-index on different cycles.

**What is the difference between AEO and SEO?**
SEO optimizes for traditional blue-link rankings. AEO
optimizes for AI-generated answers — ensuring the business
is cited when customers ask AI assistants for recommendations.

**Who is Voxaris for?**
Local service businesses, marketing agencies reselling AEO,
and SaaS companies competing for AI-recommended tool mentions.

**Where is Voxaris located?**
Orlando, Florida, USA. We serve clients nationally and locally
in the Orlando metro area.
